title: Pen Pen is Rei
wikitext:
[]: Pen-Pen is... Rei?!?!? Post by Dave » Sat Sep 25, 2004 8:50 pm I just found out that Megumi Hayashibara did Pen-Pen's voice! Excuse me while I do this: O_O

[]: Post by Esion » Sat Sep 25, 2004 8:59 pm ...and the winner for most misleading title goes to...

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Sep 25, 2004 9:24 pm Yeah.... so?

[]: Post by Dave » Sat Sep 25, 2004 10:32 pm Just found it interesting is all. And cool. *Hugs Pen-Pen plushie and pretends it's Megumi*

[]: Post by Man Chong » Sat Sep 25, 2004 11:01 pm Noooow you noticed? o.O In that Evangelion extra thingie, where the voice actors ttalk and stuff...there's a segment where PenPen talks, and it becomes clear that Megumi did PenPen.

[]: Post by RubberSoul » Sat Sep 25, 2004 11:06 pm Man Chong wrote: Noooow you noticed? o.O In that Evangelion extra thingie, where the voice actors ttalk and stuff...there's a segment where PenPen talks, and it becomes clear that Megumi did PenPen.

[]: Post by Man Chong » Sat Sep 25, 2004 11:56 pm You're talking about the CD drama, right?

[]: Post by sadsadshinji » Sun Sep 26, 2004 12:42 am er...okay...that was random... then again...Shinji's voice was a girl...right?

[]: Post by Kiel » Sun Sep 26, 2004 3:19 pm Yeah, lot of parralels between the english and Japanese voice acting. Megumi Hayabarashi (spelling) played Rei, Yui and Pen Pen. Amanda Wynn Lee also played Rei, Yui, and Pen Pen. Crazy, no?

[]: Post by Dave » Sun Sep 26, 2004 3:21 pm What's with those crazy Japanese and penguins anyway? Is there some sort of penguin colony living on or near Japan? Is it a mass conspiracy? SQWUACK!!!

[]: Post by Kiel » Sun Sep 26, 2004 3:25 pm Dave, the simplest answer to your question is... ...yes, yes there is. AND THEY'RE WATCHING US RIGHT NOW!!!!! Eeeeek!! :shock:

[]: Post by max3000 » Sun Sep 26, 2004 4:35 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Yeah.... so?

[]: Post by sadsadshinji » Sun Sep 26, 2004 5:00 pm er...who's alive? the voice actor stuff also reminds me of how practically everyone for the american voice actor crew got married... eva does weird things...

[]: Post by Dark FireStar » Sun Sep 26, 2004 9:56 pm I heard on MY new Platum edition eva #1 that Megumi wanted to play Mistao or somthing (it was on the comentary). Can you belive that i got the platum edition i couldent im still shocked it looks a lot better than the orignial and sounds better to! And the extras have commentarys by Spike and some other guy i can t rember who tho.

[]: Post by RubberSoul » Sun Sep 26, 2004 10:15 pm Dark FireStar wrote: I heard on MY new Platum edition eva #1 that Megumi wanted to play Mistao or somthing (it was on the comentary).

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Sep 26, 2004 10:38 pm Yes, Amanda Winn Lee originally wanted to play Misato, but was convinced to audition for Rei by Matt Greenfield. She still audtioned for Misato, but conceeded to Alison Keith after hearing her audition. There's a joke at ADV about how Matt wanted Amanda to do Rei so he could shut her up for awhile.

[]: Post by Timesplitter 01 » Wed Sep 29, 2004 11:54 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: There's a joke at ADV about how Matt wanted Amanda to do Rei so he could shut her up for awhile.

[]: Post by Sahaquiel » Fri May 27, 2011 7:21 pm And whats the problem?

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri May 27, 2011 7:28 pm Closing on account of necro.
